---
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="cv.pdf" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download current CV
  </a>
</p>
```

[Current position]{.maintitle}

[PhD Candidate
August 2023-present day]{.position}

[Centre for Development and Environment - University of Bern]{.place}

Include Commonpaths project here

[Education]{.maintitle}

[MSc in applied and social psychology
September 2020-Juni 2022]{.position}

[Faculty of Psychology and Educational Sciences - University of Geneva]{.place}

[BSc in psychology
September 2017-Juni 2020]{.position}

[Faculty of Psychology and Educational Sciences - University of Geneva]{.place}
